customInstructions: This full-length mock test contains strictly 120 questions based on the latest HP Patwari syllabus.
The test is divided into 4 sections: General Knowledge, Mathematics & Reasoning, General English, and General Hindi.
There is a 0.25 negative marking for each incorrect answer.
Do not refresh the page or switch tabs during the test as it may submit your test automatically.
